positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized graphic illustration of abstract celestial constellations combined with mystical flora and fauna. The composition must be designed as a central medallion or circular patch. Use clean, sharp linework and flat color blocks with high contrast. Subject matter includes elegant stylized moons, glowing deep-sea jellyfish silhouettes, intertwined celestial vines, and minimal, abstract geometric patterns. Color palette: deep navy blue, midnight purple, electric cyan, and pops of glowing gold. Minimalist, highly detailed vector art style, isolated on a solid background for optimal print transfer, perfect composition, high contrast, digital illustration, 8k resolution.
